title: Fix deprecation warnings: Use sleep(Time::Span) instead of sleep 0.01
description: Fix deprecated sleep calls in spec/keyring/credential_spec.cr lines 39, 68, 97. Replace  with  or . This is a simple fix that updates the code to use the new sleep API introduced in Crystal 1.x.
close_reason: Fixed deprecated sleep calls by replacing sleep 0.01 with sleep 10.milliseconds in spec/keyring/credential_spec.cr lines 39, 68, 97. All tests pass without warnings.

title: Improve backend reliability with retry logic, circuit breaker, and performance metrics
description: Phase 3.3: Improve backend reliability with connection pooling for backends that need it, retry logic for transient failures, circuit breaker pattern for failing backends, backend switch on failure, performance metrics/logging, and backend benchmark suite. This is a collection of enhancements to make backends more robust in production environments.
close_reason: Implemented Retryable module with exponential backoff, CircuitBreaker with closed/open/half-open states and configurable thresholds, Metrics tracking for operation latency and success/failure counts, automatic backend failover on circuit open, and retry+circuit+metrics integration into all Keyring operations (get/set/delete/list). Added 34 new specs (25 unit + 9 integration). All 256 tests pass. Benchmark suite deferred as Phase 3.4 follow-up.

title: Implement metadata support in WindowsBackend
description: WindowsBackend currently lacks metadata support (supports_metadata? and set_metadata methods). Need to implement these methods to store custom metadata alongside credentials. Other backends (macOS, Linux, File) already support metadata. Implementation should follow similar pattern: store metadata as JSON in credential attributes or use Windows credential attributes if available.
close_reason: Implemented metadata support in WindowsBackend: added supports_metadata? returning true on Windows; added set_metadata method that stores metadata as JSON in credential comment field; updated get_credential and list_credentials to parse metadata from comment; modified set_password to preserve existing comment (metadata) when updating passwords; all tests pass on non-Windows platforms.

title: Implement kSecAttrAccessible support for macOS backend access control
description: TODO in src/keyring/macos_backend.cr line 145: Implement proper kSecAttrAccessible support for access control. This would allow specifying access control levels like kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlocked, kSecAttrAccessibleAfterFirstUnlock, etc. for better security and keychain item accessibility.

title: Setup proper open source project infrastructure
description: Set up comprehensive open source project infrastructure including: 1) CHANGELOG.md with proper format (keepachangelog.com), 2) GitHub Actions CI workflow for testing on macOS, Linux, Windows, 3) pre-commit hooks for code formatting and linting (crystal tool format, ameba), 4) Ameba lint configuration for code quality, 5) CONTRIBUTING.md with detailed guidelines, 6) SECURITY.md security policy, 7) issue templates for bugs/features, 8) pull request template, 9) code coverage reporting, 10) release automation workflow. This is critical for project maintainability and community contributions.

title: Implement CLI enhancements (Phase 5)
description: Phase 5: CLI & UX Enhancements. Includes enhanced CLI commands (config show/set, backend list/switch, generate-key, update, copy), improved CLI UX (progress indicators, confirmation prompts, better error messages, JSON output, verbose/quiet flags, shell completion), and interactive features (interactive mode, password strength indicator, password generator, credential viewer, bulk operations).
close_reason: Added: config set, backend list/switch, update command, --password-stdin, --verbose/--quiet, --confirm, bash+zsh shell completion, better error messages with service:user context, config set_property on Config, list_available_backends/switch_to_backend on Keyring. Renamed to keyring_cr with XDG keyring_cr paths. Fixed FileBackend init ordering bug (mkdir before key gen). Fixed test isolation (XDG_CONFIG_HOME). 11 new CLI tests. 267 examples, 0 failures.

title: Complete documentation and examples (Phase 6)
description: Phase 6: Documentation & Polish. Includes code documentation (module/class/method docs with examples, generate API docs), user documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, installation/usage/backends/configuration/api/troubleshooting/migration guides), examples & tutorials (basic usage, custom backend, encryption, batch operations, migration from Python keyring).

title: Complete comprehensive test suite (Phase 4)
description: Phase 4: Comprehensive Testing. Includes backend contract tests, core API tests, component tests, CLI tests (some pending), integration tests. Currently 23 pending specs across spec files. Need to implement pending tests, achieve >80% test coverage, and ensure all backend contract tests pass for all backends.

title: Fix Apple container system for Linux backend testing
Fix remaining ameba lint issues in src files
Implement pending integration tests (22 pending specs)
description: Phase 4: Pending tests. Originally 22 pending specs. Now down to 2 pending (Linux ARM64 runtime blocked - secret_service_search_sync) + 1 error (KWallet qdbus not available in CI). Remaining items are platform-gated and tracked separately (keyring-enu). KWallet get_credential super bug fixed.
